items.title: Strait of Hormuz closed again, Iran says, as ships attacked
items.dek: Tehran is blaming a US blockade for its actions, saying it breaches the ceasefire the two reached.
items.body: Tehran is blaming a US blockade for its actions, saying it breaches the ceasefire the two reached.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Durant out for Game 1 vs. Lakers with knee injury
items.dek: The Houston Rockets will be without star Kevin Durant for Game 1 of their first-round series against the Los Angeles Lakers because of a right knee injury susta
items.body: The Houston Rockets will be without star Kevin Durant for Game 1 of their first-round series against the Los Angeles Lakers because of a right knee injury sustained at practice this week.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Man United close in on UCL return by beating increasingly toxic Chelsea
items.dek: Michael Carrick seems to have the blueprint to get Man United back to Europe's top table after beating Chelsea, whose season is quickly slipping away.
items.body: Michael Carrick seems to have the blueprint to get Man United back to Europe's top table after beating Chelsea, whose season is quickly slipping away.
items.author: IriLine Desk
